positive: CREATE FUNCTION evil() RETURNS void AS '/tmp/x.so', 'x' LANGUAGE C;
negative: SELECT 'CREATE FUNCTION evil() RETURNS void LANGUAGE C';

positive: CREATE EVENT TRIGGER et ON ddl_command_end EXECUTE FUNCTION f();
negative: SELECT 'CREATE EVENT TRIGGER et ON ddl_command_end';

positive: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION sub CONNECTION 'host=remote' PUBLICATION pub;
GRANT SELECT ON t TO PUBLIC;
negative: GRANT SELECT ON t TO app_role;

positive: ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO PUBLIC;
negative: ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO app_role;
ALTER ROLE app RENAME TO app2;

positive: CREATE USER MAPPING FOR app SERVER s OPTIONS (password 'secret');
negative: SELECT 'CREATE USER MAPPING FOR app SERVER s OPTIONS (password secret)';

positive: CREATE SERVER s FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw OPTIONS (host 'remote');
negative: SELECT 'CREATE SERVER s FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER postgres_fdw';

positive: CREATE USER MAPPING FOR app SERVER s OPTIONS (user 'u');
negative: SELECT 'CREATE USER MAPPING FOR app SERVER s';

positive: CREATE PUBLICATION pub FOR ALL TABLES;
negative: CREATE PUBLICATION pub FOR TABLE t;

positive: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION sub CONNECTION 'host=remote user=repl password=secret' PUBLICATION pub;
negative: CREATE SUBSCRIPTION sub CONNECTION 'host=remote user=repl' PUBLICATION pub;

positive: CREATE FUNCTION f() RETURNS int LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 1; END; $$;
negative: CREATE FUNCTION f() RETURNS int LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER SET search_path = app, pg_temp AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 1; END; $$;

positive: CREATE FUNCTION f(p text) RETURNS void LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER SET search_path = app AS $$ BEGIN EXECUTE 'DROP TABLE ' || p; END; $$;
negative: CREATE FUNCTION f() RETURNS int LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER SET search_path = app AS $$ BEGIN RETURN 1; END; $$;

positive: GRANT SELECT ON t TO app WITH GRANT OPTION;
negative: GRANT SELECT ON t TO app;

positive: ALTER TABLE t DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
negative: ALTER TABLE t ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

positive: CREATE POLICY p ON t USING (true);
ALTER TABLE t DISABLE TRIGGER trg;
negative: ALTER TABLE t ENABLE TRIGGER trg;

positive: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION pg_catalog.f() RETURNS int LANGUAGE sql AS $$ SELECT 1 $$;
negative: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION app.f() RETURNS int LANGUAGE sql AS $$ SELECT 1 $$;

positive: REASSIGN OWNED BY olduser TO newuser;

negative:
ALTER SYSTEM SET edb_audit_statement = 'none';
SELECT pg_reload_conf();

positive:
ALTER SYSTEM SET edb_audit_statement = 'none';
SELECT pg_reload_conf();

negative: CREATE FUNCTION f() RETURNS void LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ BEGIN CREATE USER hacker; END; $$;
